captures.notes: Canonical Countertype site link for attribution and three-text pipeline framing; local evidence below is generated from scratch for learning review.
Local generated rebuild screenshot showing glyph meshes, paragraph baselines, geometry cache, variable-axis handles, and depth edges; not copied from Countertype demos.
Local generated motion clip isolates glyph retessellation, baseline stability, cache-state highlighting, and variable-axis state changes; not copied from Countertype demos.
Standalone local HTML/SVG exercise reconstructing the primitive with generated glyph meshes, layout rails, cache cells, axis handles, and CSS-only retessellation motion.
Manifest lists only generated local learning evidence plus source-link attribution boundaries.

payload.learning_primitive: 3D typography as layout plus glyph geometry
payload.visual_role: teaches how text becomes spatial vector material while staying readable

modules.review_notes: Complete for first-pass learning: still image, motion clip, and code note all show the same typography primitive.

payload.font_boundary: no Countertype fonts or runtime assets are archived
payload.learning_primitive: font source to shaped glyph mesh to cached geometry

modules.review_notes: Asset pipeline is represented as a rights-safe generated proxy with explicit font/runtime boundaries.

payload.cache_model: hot cells indicate reused glyph geometry and line-box reuse
payload.learning_primitive: typography runtime budget as cache and retessellation policy
runtime_risks: GPU memory churn from rebuilt glyph meshes

modules.review_notes: Performance layer is complete as a teaching abstraction, not a benchmark of the original project.

payload.evidence_layer: local PNG proves layout and mesh structure, local GIF proves retessellation state, HTML proves the typography pipeline taxonomy
payload.learning_primitive: review labels and interface text as spatial vector material
payload.review_gap: canonical Countertype site remains link-only; local rebuild teaches mechanics without Countertype screenshots, code, runtime, fonts, adapters, or demos
payload.route_decision: use layout rails for readability, glyph meshes for identity, cache cells for runtime reasoning, and axis handles for interaction state
payload.source_trail: canonical Countertype site plus generated local reconstruction
payload.uncertainty: exact Countertype implementation details, adapter behavior, multilingual shaping examples, and performance numbers are not claimed

modules.review_notes: VULCA mapping is complete because source, evidence, review gap, route decision, and uncertainty are all represented.

summary: Modern Three.js typography reference rebuilt as a local 3D text primitive with paragraph baselines, glyph meshes, geometry cache, variable-axis handles, motion, code, and asset evidence.
title: Countertype three-text
why_relevant: Completes the atlas's typography_3d branch by teaching how text becomes spatial vector material with layout, cache, and retessellation constraints.
